title: Customer Placing the Largest Number of Orders

testcases.input: Orders table: +--------------+-----------------+ | order_number | customer_number | +--------------+-----------------+ | 1 | 1 | | 2 | 2 | | 3 | 3 | | 4 | 3 | +--------------+-----------------+ Output: +-----------------+ | customer_number | +-----------------+ | 3 | +-----------------+ Explanation: The customer with number 3 has two orders, which is greater than either customer 1 or 2 because each of them only has one order. So the result is customer_number 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: +-----------------+ | customer_number | +-----------------+ | 3 | +-----------------+ Explanation: The customer with number 3 has two orders, which is greater than either customer 1 or 2 because each of them only has one order. So the result is customer_number 3.
